title: GitHub Actions - Matrixbuilds
problem: How to set up a GitHub Actions workflow with matrix strategy for testing multiple versions/platforms
solution:
name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]
  workflow_dispatch:   # manual trigger
    inputs:
      environment:
        description: 'Deploy environment'
        required: true
        default: 'dev'
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 2 * * *'   # daily at 2 AM

concurrency:            # Prevents duplicate runs
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  build:
    strategy:

    # matrix → Run jobs across multiple OS/versions.
    # exclude/include → Fine-tune combinations.
    # fail-fast → Stop (default) or continue all jobs if one fails.
    # max-parallel → Limit concurrency.
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest]
        java: [17, 19]
    # Exclude & Include in Matrix
        # exclude:
        # - os: windows-latest
        #   java: 19
        # include:
        # - os: ubuntu-latest
        #   java: 21   # Add extra combo

    # Fail-Fast Strategy
      # fail-fast: false

    # Max Parallel Jobs
      # max-parallel: 2
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Set up Java
        uses: actions/setup-java@v3
        with:
          java-version: ${{ matrix.java }}

      - name: Cache Maven dependencies
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        with:
          path: ~/.m2/repository
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-maven-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-maven-

      - name: Build with Maven
        run: mvn clean package
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Upload build artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: app-${{ matrix.os }}-${{ matrix.java }}
          path: target/*.jar

  test:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Run unit tests
        run: mvn test

  deploy:
    needs: [build, test]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    environment:
      name: production
      url: https://myapp.example.com   # shows in UI
    steps:
      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: app-ubuntu-latest-17   # pick one build artifact
      - name: Deploy
        run: echo "Deploying to ${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}"
        env:
          DB_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.DB_PASSWORD }}

  rollback:
    needs: deploy
    if: failure()
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: echo "Deployment failed! Rolling back..."
